headline: Raymond James Financial Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) reported record fiscal second-quarter 2026 results, with management emphasizing resilient performance amid a “challenging and volatile market environment,” continued advisor recruiting momentum, and record balances in key areas including bank loans and fee-based as
